sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27688" key="dixopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐχο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n27688.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">productive of division,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑνοποιός,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inMetaph.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">58.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
